title: puccinellia × pseudoprocumbens
intro: Puccinellia × pseudoprocumbens, also known as False Cottongrass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to soothe respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Puccinellia × pseudoprocumbens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
